operatingRules: Permit applicant businesses are buyer-validation candidates, not validated land buyers, until a call confirms buy box and acquisition appetite.
Zillow/business directories were not used for validation.
No outreach performed; no contacts or buy boxes fabricated.

adapterFeasibility.approach: Use ArcGIS REST query against Building_Permits FeatureServer/0; filter ISSUED_YEAR >= currentYear-1, B1_PER_TYPE = 1,2,3 Family, B1_PER_CATEGORY = New Structure; group by normalized APPLICANT_BUS_NAME aliases; keep latest 3-5 ACA_URL permit samples; emit builder_signals.json, builder_validation_queue.csv, market_evidence.json.

blockers: Public permit layer gives APPLICANT_BUS_NAME but not direct acquisition contact or land-buy box.
Some applicants are developers/affordable housing operators/entities rather than conventional lot buyers; call confirmation required.
Franklin County suburbs outside Columbus city limits require separate municipal/county permit sources for full metro coverage.
